/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=full --no-entry -sEXPORT_ES6=0 -sMODULARIZE=0 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=128MB -sMAXIMUM_MEMORY=4096MB -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sFORCE_FILESYSTEM=1 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_main,_wllama_malloc,_wllama_start,_wllama_action,_wllama_exit,_wllama_debug -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall,cwrap,HEAPU8,MEMFS,FS,mmapAlloc,ENV,wasmMemory -sNO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1 -sIMPORTED_MEMORY=1 -sPTHREAD_POOL_SIZE=Module[\"pthreadPoolSize\"] -sUSE_PTHREADS=1 -pthread -Wl,--wrap,fopen -Wl,--wrap,fclose -Wl,--wrap,fread -Wl,--wrap,fseek -Wl,--wrap,ftell -fexceptions -sASYNCIFY=1 "-sASYNCIFY_ADD=['wllama_start','wllama_action']" @CMakeFiles/llama-gemma3-cli.dir/objects1.rsp -o llama-gemma3-cli.js
